title: IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply for 02 Young Professional Posts
description: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute ( IARI) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 02 Young Professional Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for any degree, M.Sc, can grab this chance and apply for the IARI Recruitment 2026 . Here, we include the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
